text: Being here, I sense a subtle thrill of anticipation mixed with intellectual curiosity. Walking past the glass-walled room, I notice people in an exchange of ideas—a shared sense of purpose hangs in the air. Entering the exhibition space, I’m surrounded by the vibrant colors and the call of Research + Development. The poetic text about confusion resonates with me, kindling an acute awareness of my own presence in this evolving space of thought. I feel both an observer and a participant—comforted by the acceptance that meaning is pieced together only after our experiences have passed.
